data.en: What does family mean to you?
data.cn: 家庭对你来说意味着什么？
data.hint: mean (意味着) + to you (对你来说)
accept: What do family mean to you?

data.en: Talk about your family with the simple present tense.
data.cn: 用一般现在时谈论你的家庭。
data.hint: Talk about (谈论) + simple present tense (一般现在时)
accept: Talk with the simple present tense about your family.

data.en: What is the relationship of the people in the photo?
data.cn: 照片中这些人的关系是什么？
data.hint: relationship (关系) + of the people (这些人的)
accept: What is the people's relationship in the photo?

data.en: Who are the people in your family?
data.cn: 你家里有哪些人？
data.hint: Who (谁) + in your family (在你家里)
accept: Who are your family members?

data.en: Is this your family photo, Peter?
data.cn: 这是你的全家福吗，彼得？
data.hint: Is this (这是...吗) + family photo (全家福)
accept: Peter, is this your family photo?

data.en: He's my father's brother, my uncle.
data.cn: 他是我父亲的弟弟，我的叔叔。
accept: He is my father's brother, my uncle.

data.en: They're my grandparents.
data.cn: 他们是我的祖父母。
accept: They are my grandparents.

data.en: What a happy family!
data.cn: 多么幸福的一家啊！
data.hint: What a... (多么...啊) + happy family (幸福的家庭)
accept: What happy family it is!

data.en: Hi, Peter! Come in.
data.cn: 嗨，彼得！快进来。
accept: Come in, Peter!

data.en: Do you often play ping-pong together?
data.cn: 你们经常一起打乒乓球吗？
data.hint: Do you often (你经常...吗) + play together (一起玩)
accept: Do you play ping-pong together often?

data.en: Whose fishing rods are those?
data.cn: 那些是谁的钓鱼竿？
data.hint: Whose (谁的) + plural subject (复数主语)
accept: Whose rods for fishing are those?

data.en: He spends a lot of time fishing.
data.cn: 他花很多时间钓鱼。
data.hint: spend time doing (花时间做某事)
accept: He spends lots of time fishing.

data.en: She can play it really well!
data.cn: 她能弹得非常好！
accept: She can really play it well!

data.en: Does she play the erhu well?
data.cn: 她二胡拉得好吗？
data.hint: Does (助动词) + play well (拉得好)
accept: Does she play erhu well?

data.en: Whose caps are these?
data.cn: 这些是谁的帽子？
accept: Whose are these caps?

data.en: They like wearing caps.
data.cn: 他们喜欢戴帽子。
data.hint: like doing (喜欢做某事) + wearing (戴着)
accept: They like to wear caps.

data.en: Whose schoolbag is this?
data.cn: 这是谁的书包？
accept: Whose is this schoolbag?

data.en: He likes the colour blue.
data.cn: 他喜欢蓝色。
accept: He likes blue colour.

data.en: I have a brother and a sister.
data.cn: 我有一个哥哥和一个姐姐。
accept: I have one brother and one sister.

data.en: He often makes us laugh.
data.cn: 他经常逗我们笑。
data.hint: make somebody do (使某人做某事)
accept: He makes us laugh often.

data.en: My sister is very different.
data.cn: 我姐姐很不一样。
accept: My sister is so different.

data.en: She really likes reading.
data.cn: 她非常喜欢读书。
accept: She likes reading really much.

data.en: We have a lot of fun together.
data.cn: 我们在一起玩得很开心。
data.hint: have fun (玩得开心) + together (一起)
accept: Together we have a lot of fun.

data.en: How many people are there in your family?
data.cn: 你家有几口人？
accept: How many family members do you have?

data.en: I'm the one with the pink hat.
data.cn: 我是戴粉红色帽子的那个人。
data.hint: the one (那个人) + with (带着/戴着)
accept: The one with pink hat is me.

data.en: He often plays tennis with me.
data.cn: 他经常和我打网球。
accept: He plays tennis with me often.

data.en: Sam is seven, and he really likes chess.
data.cn: 萨姆七岁了，他真的很喜欢下棋。
accept: Sam is seven years old, and he really likes chess.

data.en: She always reads me a story at night.
data.cn: 她总是在晚上给我读故事。
data.hint: read somebody a story (给某人读故事)
accept: At night she always reads me a story.

data.en: They often say I'm their favourite grandchild.
data.cn: 他们经常说我是他们最喜欢的孙辈。
accept: They often say that I'm their favourite grandchild.

data.en: Fred is Jack and Sarah's son.
data.cn: 弗雷德是杰克和萨拉的儿子。
accept: Jack and Sarah's son is Fred.

data.en: What do you like about your family?
data.cn: 你喜欢你家人的什么？
accept: What do you like regarding your family?

data.en: Who are they and what are they like?
data.cn: 他们是谁，他们是什么样的人？
data.hint: what are they like (他们长/人怎么样)
accept: What are they like and who are they?

data.en: Next to him is my mum.
data.cn: 他旁边是我妈妈。
accept: My mum is next to him.

data.en: I'm always happy, and I love animals.
data.cn: 我总是很快乐，而且我爱动物。
accept: I love animals and I'm always happy.

data.en: He has big eyes.
data.cn: 他有一双大眼睛。
accept: His eyes are big.

data.en: We love and help each other.
data.cn: 我们互相爱护，互相帮助。
accept: We help and love each other.

data.en: Make a family tree like the one below.
data.cn: 做一个像下面这样的家谱。
accept: Make family tree like the one below.

data.en: Introduce your family to the class.
data.cn: 向全班介绍你的家人。
accept: Introduce to the class your family.

data.en: I can name different family members.
data.cn: 我能说出不同家庭成员的名字。
data.hint: name (命名/说出名字) + different (不同的)
accept: I can name members of different families.

data.en: I can express my love for my family.
data.cn: 我能表达我对家人的爱。
accept: I can express love for my family.

data.en: Family is where life begins and love never ends.
data.cn: 家是生命开始的地方，爱永无止境。
data.hint: where (哪里/的地方) + never ends (从未结束)
accept: Life begins at family and love never ends.

data.en: Here most people have three names.
data.cn: 在这里大多数人有三个名字。
accept: Most people here have three names.

data.en: Alan is my first name.
data.cn: 艾伦是我的名。
accept: My first name is Alan.

data.en: Wood is my last name.
data.cn: 伍德是我的姓。
accept: My last name is Wood.

data.en: It shows great respect to my grandfather.
data.cn: 这表现了对我祖父极大的尊重。
accept: It shows to my grandfather great respect.

data.en: A woman often changes her family name.
data.cn: 女性经常更改她的姓氏。
accept: Women often change their family names.

data.en: Names show family ties.
data.cn: 名字显示了家庭纽带。
accept: Family ties are shown by names.

data.en: How do parents come up with names?
data.cn: 父母是如何想出名字的？
accept: How do parents think of names?

data.en: What is the meaning of your name?
data.cn: 你名字的含义是什么？
accept: What does your name mean?

data.en: Welcome to our big family!
data.cn: 欢迎来到我们的大家庭！
accept: Welcome into our big family!
